name: Radio
description: A single radio option, typically used within a radio group.

props.name: size
props.description: Radio button size controlling circle dimensions, label text, and dot size.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether this radio is selected. Reflects to the `checked` attribute.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and apply dimmed styling.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Apply error border styling when unchecked.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme for the selected state border and dot fill.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name. Should match across radios in the same group.

props.name: value
props.description: Value emitted in `kb-change` event detail when this radio is selected.

props.name: required
props.description: Mark this radio as required for form validation.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Helper text rendered below the label.

events.name: kb-change
events.description: Checked state changed. Detail: `{ checked: boolean, value: string }`.
